summary: Recovery run: tiers refreshed (Wowhead unreachable); Archon survivability+encounters recovered; metrics updated; PTR build #14/#15 logged; WCL rdps 500 (5 unreachable); creators polled.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl and parsed from the tier-list table; era-verified Midnight S1 / Patch 12.0.7; 40+40 specs matched roster exactly. Movement vs prior: 3 M+ moves (MM Hunter / Devastation Evoker / Fire Mage B→C).

Both pages fetched live and parsed from tier__tier blocks; era-verified. Raid 39 specs (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream — absence, not error); M+ 40 specs (S tier genuinely empty this week). 3 M+ moves S→A (Brewmaster / Vengeance DH / Restoration Shaman). Method's separate dungeon-difficulty tier list correctly excluded.

Raw HTML 403 from this datacenter IP (bot-block), r.jina.ai proxy also 403, and WebFetch returns only the JS shell (tier data is client-rendered) — no honest tier data obtainable from CI this run. Existing 2026-07-14 ratings left untouched per never-guess rule; re-check next run / local.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection; 80 rows matched roster. 14 moves: a genuine raid throughput reshuffle (5 specs S→A, 8 A→B) + Restoration Shaman M+ A→S. Parsed directly from the JSON, verified against icon Class-Spec mapping.

Full refresh of all 9 raid bosses + 8 M+ dungeons across all 3 roles (51 pages, throughput for raid / score for M+); every encounter 40/40 specs. 680 cells, 78 changed, 0 added/removed — structure identical to prior, ~11% weekly churn.

RECOVERED: Archon's raid survivability tierList is populated again this run (it was genuinely empty upstream on 07-14). 40 rows parsed from the survivability metric on the 3 raid pages; only 3 moves vs the last-good baseline (Outlaw A→B, Feral B→C, Retribution B→C), confirming a clean parse.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) parsed from the SvelteKit payload (border-tier-list-<tier> classes); 40 specs ranked, sequence monotonic S→D confirming correct tier assignment. Large but genuine weekly reshuffle (26 of 40 moved, several multi-band) — WoWMeta is volatile week-to-week. Raid still unranked upstream (left as-is).

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 — the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Zero rows landed; the agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic data left unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome (aggregate=amount → median rDPS) cannot land. spec.ptrDummy left unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline (27 specs).

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET and parsed for the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling; era-verified. All values byte-identical to the prior snapshot — confirmed stable, not a stale skip.

26/27 DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk, MID1 + ptr:0 confirmed on every chart; counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design (upstream returns no chart). Elemental Shaman RECOVERED a fresh chart (previously stuck at 2026-07-01); the other 25 byte-identical.

Fresh nightly MID1 raid report fetched (SimC 1205-01, WoW 12.0.7.68453 Live, hotfix 2026-07-13). 26/26 DPS specs parsed (best profile per spec from player sections); Augmentation excluded by design. Small nightly sim deltas (≤2.0%, Enhancement largest) applied as a real update.

Period advanced 1071→1072 (via /period/latest redirect). 40/40 specs computed as class% × within-class spec% from the rendered period page; role subtotals re-verified at Tank 20.0 / Healer 20.1 / DPS 60.1 (≈ key composition), total 100.2. Genuine weekly representation shifts applied.

NEW BUILD logged. Forum thread now tops at post #15 (was #13): #14 (2026-07-14, Linxy) 'Week of July 14th — Class Changes & Tier Sets' + #15 (2026-07-14) Rogue Outlaw addendum, matching Wowhead news=382170 '(Rogue Added)'. Added one ptr-builds.json entry (forumPostNumber 14) covering PvE tuning for 17 specs across 10 classes (DH, Druid, Evoker, Hunter incl. Survival Flamefang-Pitch rework, Mage, Paladin, Priest, Shaman, Warlock, Rogue) plus S2 systems/PvP. Also noted: 07-16 Wowhead 'Class Tuning Hotfixes' (news=382189) are PTR hotfixes with no forum post — NOT logged as a build per canonical-source rule.

All 24 unique creator YouTube feeds polled successfully (HTTP 200). ~15 on-topic 12.1/S2 analysis videos found since the last run (e.g. Obli DK meta shift, Shadarek Havoc outlook, Kalamazi Warlock changes, MadSkillzzTV Mistweaver/HPal tests, Tettles Balance). Transcripts UNREACHABLE from this datacenter IP — yt-dlp returns YouTube's 'Sign in to confirm you're not a bot' block — so 0 takes/metaNotes distilled this run; videos queued pending for local catch-up (documented behavior). community.json latest fields unchanged.
